mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Minnie E. Craghead, Until 07.30.1912 When she reached 21 years of age
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Minnie E. Craghead, Until 07.30.1912 When she reached 21 years of age T.B. Bell, Guardian Recorded in Ledger Book 7, page 472, of the Floyd County Circuit Court
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
